historical_review_rationale: Rejected: Pinned 3rd Avenue rows for 2023-12-08 leave sbs_route1-3 blank and do not name M79+; the association is only the generator's 150 m/400 m stop-and-street proximity match. The builder selected the latest of 5 spatially matched opening-month groups, so phase attribution is not route-authoritative. Although the Plan 074 spine is series_ready and the calendar provides four pre/four post months, coverage cannot cure insufficient authoritative evidence for an exact route-specific onset.
